INSERT INTO skill_evolution_log (sync_run_id, logged_at, trigger_source, task_name, event_type, skill_id, skill_name, tier, version_before, version_after, changed_fields, summary) VALUES
('a1b2c3d4-0001-0001-0001-000000000001', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR), 'agent-sync', 'Exponential Platform task', 'added', 'eri-ef-app', 'ERI Exponential Framework App', 3, NULL, '2.0.0', NULL, 'eri-ef-app added (Tier 3, v2.0.0)'),
('a1b2c3d4-0001-0001-0001-000000000001', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR), 'agent-sync', 'Exponential Platform task', 'added', 'eri-cpr-app', 'ERI CPR App', 3, NULL, '1.0.0', NULL, 'eri-cpr-app added (Tier 3, v1.0.0)'),
('a1b2c3d4-0001-0001-0001-000000000001', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR), 'agent-sync', 'Exponential Platform task', 'removed', 'eri-exponential-framework', 'ERI Exponential Framework', 3, '1.0.0', NULL, NULL, 'eri-exponential-framework removed (directory absent from /home/ubuntu/skills/)'),
('a1b2c3d4-0002-0002-0002-000000000002', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR), 'agent-sync', 'Skills Evolution Log implementation', 'updated', 'eri-skills-orchestrator', 'ERI Skills Orchestrator', 1, '1.1.0', '1.2.0', '["description","version"]', 'eri-skills-orchestrator updated: description, version (1.1.0 → 1.2.0)'),
('a1b2c3d4-0003-0003-0003-000000000003', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR), 'heartbeat', NULL, 'added', 'eri-cpr-app', 'ERI CPR App', 3, NULL, '1.0.0', NULL, 'eri-cpr-app added (Tier 3, v1.0.0)');
